purpose: Project a professional HTML and SVG proof surface in the temp bench.

content: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="1200" height="700" viewBox="0 0 1200 700" role="img" aria-label="Conveyor proof diagram">
<rect width="1200" height="700" fill="#f3f4f6"/>
<rect x="72" y="56" width="1056" height="588" rx="24" fill="#ffffff" stroke="#d1d5db"/>
<text x="112" y="126" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="30" font-weight="700" fill="#0f172a">Conveyor Proof Surface</text>
<text x="112" y="162" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="16" fill="#475569">A clean projection from narrative authority to published artifact surfaces.</text>
<rect x="112" y="214" width="296" height="132" rx="16" fill="#0ea5e9" opacity="0.12" stroke="#0ea5e9"/>
<text x="138" y="258" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="20" font-weight="700" fill="#0369a1">Source Narrative</text>
<text x="138" y="288" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="15" fill="#075985">Intent, constraints, and scope</text>
<text x="138" y="314" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="15" fill="#075985">enter the conveyor as authority</text>
<rect x="452" y="214" width="296" height="132" rx="16" fill="#22c55e" opacity="0.12" stroke="#22c55e"/>
<text x="478" y="258" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="20" font-weight="700" fill="#166534">Gemini Flash</text>
<text x="478" y="288" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="15" fill="#14532d">Bounded lane work</text>
<text x="478" y="314" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="15" fill="#14532d">returns structured evidence</text>
<rect x="792" y="214" width="296" height="132" rx="16" fill="#f59e0b" opacity="0.14" stroke="#f59e0b"/>
<text x="818" y="258" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="20" font-weight="700" fill="#92400e">Projected Surfaces</text>
<text x="818" y="288" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="15" fill="#78350f">HTML, SVG, docs, receipts</text>
<text x="818" y="314" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="15" fill="#78350f">published through Drive</text>
<line x1="408" y1="280" x2="452" y2="280" stroke="#64748b" stroke-width="4" marker-end="url(#arrow)"/>
<line x1="748" y1="280" x2="792" y2="280" stroke="#64748b" stroke-width="4" marker-end="url(#arrow)"/>
<rect x="112" y="398" width="976" height="164" rx="16" fill="#f8fafc" stroke="#e2e8f0"/>
<text x="138" y="442" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="18" font-weight="700" fill="#0f172a">What this proves</text>

<text x="138" y="472" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="15" fill="#334155">The conveyor can take declared intent, route it through the live worker lane, and emit receipt-backed outputs.</text>

<text x="138" y="504" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="15" fill="#334155">The result is not a hand-authored artifact pretending to be generated. The result is a governed projection with lineage.</text>
<text x="138" y="536" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="15" fill="#334155">High fidelity means the output reads like a finished artifact, not a console transcript.</text>
<defs>
<marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="8" refY="5" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="8" orient="auto">
</marker>
</defs>
</svg>
<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="utf-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
<title>Conveyor Proof Surface</title>
<style>
body { margin: 0; background: #f3f4f6; color: #0f172a; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; }
main { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 32px 28px 40px; }
.panel { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #d1d5db; border-radius: 24px; overflow: hidden; }
.hero { padding: 34px 40px 20px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e5e7eb; }
.eyebrow { font-size: 12px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em; color: #64748b; margin: 0 0 10px; }
h1 { margin: 0; font-size: 34px; line-height: 1.1; }
.lede { margin: 10px 0 0; font-size: 17px; color: #334155; max-width: 72ch; }
.chips { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 10px; margin-top: 18px; }
.chip { border: 1px solid #cbd5e1; background: #f8fafc; border-radius: 999px; padding: 8px 12px; font-size: 13px; color: #0f172a; }
.content { padding: 30px 40px 40px; }
.section { margin-top: 28px; }
.section h2 { margin: 0 0 12px; font-size: 20px; line-height: 1.2; }
.section p { margin: 0 0 12px; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.62; color: #334155; }
.grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap: 14px; margin-top: 18px; }
.card { background: #f8fafc; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 18px; padding: 18px; min-height: 126px; }
.card h3 { margin: 0 0 10px; font-size: 16px; }
.card p { margin: 0; font-size: 14px; color: #475569; }
.figure { margin: 22px 0 0; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 18px; padding: 18px; }
svg { width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; }
table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; margin-top: 16px; font-size: 14px; }
th, td { text-align: left; border-top: 1px solid #e5e7eb; padding: 12px 10px; vertical-align: top; }
th { width: 28%; color: #334155; font-weight: 700; }
.foot { padding: 18px 40px 32px; color: #64748b; font-size: 13px; border-top: 1px solid #e5e7eb; }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<main>
<article class="panel">
<header class="hero">
Conveyor proof surface
High fidelity projection from narrative authority

This surface is produced by the conveyor, not hand-stitched. It is designed to read like a finished artifact: clear hierarchy, restrained styling, and a clean visual explanation of how intent becomes a receipted output.
<div class="chips">
Gemini Flash lane
Receipt-backed output
Drive-publishable HTML
</header>
<div class="content">
<section class="section">
What the conveyor is proving
<div class="grid">

Authority in

Declared narrative enters the conveyor as governed input, not as freeform runtime guesswork.

Worker execution

Gemini Flash performs bounded lane work and returns structured evidence that the runner can verify.

Published surface

The output is a clean artifact that can be reviewed, linked, and shipped through a trusted surface.
</section>
<section class="figure" aria-label="Conveyor proof diagram">
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 1200 700" role="img" aria-label="Conveyor proof diagram">
<rect width="1200" height="700" fill="#f3f4f6"/>
<rect x="72" y="56" width="1056" height="588" rx="24" fill="#ffffff" stroke="#d1d5db"/>
<text x="112" y="126" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="30" font-weight="700" fill="#0f172a">Conveyor Proof Surface</text>
<text x="112" y="162" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="16" fill="#475569">A clean projection from narrative authority to published artifact surfaces.</text>
<rect x="112" y="214" width="296" height="132" rx="16" fill="#0ea5e9" opacity="0.12" stroke="#0ea5e9"/>
<text x="138" y="258" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="20" font-weight="700" fill="#0369a1">Source Narrative</text>
<text x="138" y="288" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="15" fill="#075985">Intent, constraints, and scope</text>
<text x="138" y="314" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="15" fill="#075985">enter the conveyor as authority</text>
<rect x="452" y="214" width="296" height="132" rx="16" fill="#22c55e" opacity="0.12" stroke="#22c55e"/>
<text x="478" y="258" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="20" font-weight="700" fill="#166534">Gemini Flash</text>
<text x="478" y="288" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="15" fill="#14532d">Bounded lane work</text>
<text x="478" y="314" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="15" fill="#14532d">returns structured evidence</text>
<rect x="792" y="214" width="296" height="132" rx="16" fill="#f59e0b" opacity="0.14" stroke="#f59e0b"/>
<text x="818" y="258" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="20" font-weight="700" fill="#92400e">Projected Surfaces</text>
<text x="818" y="288" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="15" fill="#78350f">HTML, SVG, docs, receipts</text>
<text x="818" y="314" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="15" fill="#78350f">published through Drive</text>
<line x1="408" y1="280" x2="452" y2="280" stroke="#64748b" stroke-width="4" marker-end="url(#arrow)"/>
<line x1="748" y1="280" x2="792" y2="280" stroke="#64748b" stroke-width="4" marker-end="url(#arrow)"/>
<rect x="112" y="398" width="976" height="164" rx="16" fill="#f8fafc" stroke="#e2e8f0"/>
<text x="138" y="442" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="18" font-weight="700" fill="#0f172a">What this proves</text>

<text x="138" y="472" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="15" fill="#334155">The conveyor can take declared intent, route it through the live worker lane, and emit receipt-backed outputs.</text>

<text x="138" y="504" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="15" fill="#334155">The result is not a hand-authored artifact pretending to be generated. The result is a governed projection with lineage.</text>
<text x="138" y="536" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="15" fill="#334155">High fidelity means the output reads like a finished artifact, not a console transcript.</text>
<defs>
<marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="8" refY="5" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="8" orient="auto">
</marker>
</defs>
</svg>
</section>
<section class="section">
Quality bar
<table>
FidelityThe surface should look designed, not dumped. Clear hierarchy, whitespace, and no boilerplate bleeding through.
TraceabilityEvery visible claim should still map back to the conveyor chain: source, worker, receipt, and published surface.
PublishabilityThe artifact should be suitable for Drive or web publication without another pass to rescue formatting.
</section>
Produced through the conveyor as a receipt-backed proof surface.
</article>
</main>
</body>
</html>

content.completionPosture: The conveyor can project a professional visual surface as both SVG and HTML from JSON authority.
